betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Arsenic Bronze§f

§aA copper-arsenic alloy that can replace bismuth bronze in nearly every recipe!§f

§bArsenic Bronze§f is a copper-based alloy mixed with arsenic. It is a substitute for bismuth bronze in most end-game recipes, making it a cost-effective alternative for large-scale production.

§6Production§f (§bCrucible§f):
§b• 8×§f Copper (nuggets)
§b• 1×§f Arsenic (nugget)
§b• 3×§f Flux
§b→ §e1 Arsenic Bronze Ingot§f + §e3 Slag Nuggets§f

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• §eTier 5 Anvils§f — Arsenic Bronze Anvil (Iron Anvil + 10 Arsenic Bronze Ingots)
§b• §ePlasma Forge§f — Welded Technetium Steel + Dense BSCCO Wire + Cast Bismuth Bronze + Versatile Circuit Board
§b• §eHeavy Duty Element§f — Plasma Forge: Welded Combine Steel + Cast Bismuth Bronze + Crystalline Fullerite + Stellar Flux
§b• §eMHD Turbine§f — high-end power generation component
§b• §eInertial Confinement Fusion Reactor§f — cast arsenic bronze plates
§b• §eOverdrive Upgrade Mk.III§f — replaces bismuth bronze in the recipe
§b• §eLaser Rifle§f — bronze weapon parts

§eTip§f: Arsenic bronze is a direct drop-in replacement for bismuth bronze in most recipes, making it ideal when bismuth is scarce. Set up automated crucible alloying with AE2 for continuous production!
